home.heroDesc: Official Sea of Thieves competitions. Gather your crew, join tournaments and conquer the top of the seas.
home.createTeamDesc: Create or organize your crew to enter the championships.
home.chooseTournamentDesc: See published events and select the right tournament for your team.
home.trackRankingDesc: Monitor your evolution and compare performance with other teams.
home.noActiveTornament: No active tournaments at the moment
home.noActiveTornamentDesc: Keep an eye out  new tournaments will be announced soon.
home.noFinishedTourney: No finished tournaments yet. The first one is coming soon.
home.readyForBattleDesc: Assemble your crew, sign up for tournaments and prove who rules the seas. Every match counts for the ranking.

ranking.title: Pirates Leaderboard
ranking.desc: Ordered by points and wins in each category.
ranking.empty: No scores registered for this category yet.

teams.title: Guilds & Crews
teams.desc: Find active teams, check their members, or start your own journey across the seas.
teams.search: Search team by name or tag...
teams.noResults: No teams found with this search.
teams.teamLimitReached: You are already in a team

streams.title: Broadcasts & VODs
streams.desc: Watch live games or catch the highlights from the latest tournaments.
streams.noVods: No VODs available at the moment.

rules.title: Rules & Conduct
rules.desc: Carefully read the guidelines that keep Madness Arena fair and competitive for everyone.

events.title: Arena Tournaments
events.desc: All Sea of Thieves tournaments organized by MadnessArena. Register your team and compete for the glory of the seas.
